description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-slider`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-slider/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 39 defects — 2 P0, 13 P1, 16 P2, 8 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [Accessibility] `aria-labelledby` points to non-existent element when label slot is populated
- [ ] [Accessibility] `aria-label` binding is effectively dead code

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-slider
